audit_items.proof_trace: region_cleanup() delegates entirely to cleanupRegionData() (L325-344), which frees each allocation exactly once in correct dependency order: availableRegions UVectors (containing deep-copied UnicodeStrings), regionAliases (key deleter frees UnicodeString* keys; no value deleter since Region* are owned by regionIDMap), numericCodeMap (no deleters; Region* owned by regionIDMap), then regionIDMap (value deleter deleteRegion frees each Region* once, including its containedRegions and preferredValues UVectors of independent copies). No pointer is accessed after being freed; no pointer is freed more than once.
